Financial Advisers in the Cotswolds

Build and protect your wealth
across the Cotswolds.

Fixed fees. Evidence-based investing. Personal planning for Cirencester, Stow-on-the-Wold, Bourton-on-the-Water, Moreton-in-Marsh and surrounding Cotswold villages.

Your Trusted Capital Market Advisors

We provide expert guidance in navigating Tanzania's capital markets with confidence. Our team offers tailored advisory in securities trading, investment strategy, and market analysis-helping investors and institutions make informed decisions, optimize returns, and achieve long-term financial success.

rockwealth helps Cotswold families and business owners build long-term financial security with evidence-based investing, fair fixed fees, and personal advice.

Qualified professionals
Dar es salaam, Tanzania

Specialist advice for complex financial needs

Know exactly when you can retire and how to make your money last. We create detailed projections, optimise your pension drawdown strategy, and ensure you can enjoy retirement with confidence.

Retirement Planning

Learn more

Navigate the complexity of pensions with confidence. From consolidation and transfers to drawdown strategies, we help you maximise your retirement income and make informed decisions.

Pension Advice

Learn more

Pass on wealth efficiently to those you love. We create tailored inheritance tax strategies, set up trusts, and ensure your legacy is protected for future generations.

Inheritance Tax Planning

Learn more

Stop guessing. Start compounding.

Leave stock-tips to the headlines. We build portfolios on peer-reviewed research, Corporate Finance Advisory , and the power of compound growth.

Bes-tCapital Built around our clients’ priorities.

Hear how rockwealth is helping families across Gloucestershire take control.

"The rockwealth team has looked after my financial investments for many years, firstly advising on saving strategies during working life and then on through to creating a successful, personal retirement portfolio. For sound, honest and realistic advice then look no further, rockwealth is a credit to their profession and comes highly recommended."
Peter Hansford
"Tim and the team at rockwealth have been looking after our financial affairs for several years now. They made some changes to what we were doing previously and they're doing an amazing job and we can relax knowing that our finances are being taken care of thoughtfully and professionally. They are really proactive and always looking for the best ways to make maximum returns from our assets."
Paul Farnworth & Jane Quinn
"The world of pensions and investments is a minefield and one which we shied away from for too long. Matt managed to make the very complicated and confusing topic actually really easy to understand. We have no hesitation in recommending rockwealth and we feel secure in the fact that we have professionals looking after our hard earned cash who are able to talk to us and encourage us to think about life and what we want to get out of it."
Mike & Rachel Tuffy
"We have been clients of rockwealth for a number of years now. The rockwealth team has been instrumental in shaping our savings and investment portfolio, including guiding us through making the biggest investment decision we're ever likely to make in respect of our pensions. The team always takes time to clearly explain options available. We've always found rockwealth to be a pleasure to deal with and expect our relationship to last for years to come."
Ian & Jane Nelder

rockwealth Financial Planning Team

Common questions about financial advice

Everything you need to know about working with a financial planner in the Cotswolds.

A financial adviser helps you make sense of your money and plan for the future. At rockwealth, we start by understanding your life goals - whether that's retiring with confidence, supporting family, or creating long-term financial security. We then build a joined-up strategy across investments, pensions, tax efficiency, and estate planning.

We believe in transparent, fixed fees rather than percentage-based charges that grow with your wealth. You know exactly what you'll pay from the outset. We offer a free initial consultation so you can understand what support you need before making any commitment.

Yes. Retirement and pensions are a core part of what we do. We help clients across the Cotswolds model retirement cashflow, consolidate pensions where appropriate, and build tax-efficient withdrawal strategies designed to support the lifestyle you want.

Our advisers hold Chartered Financial Planner status, Fellow of the Personal Finance Society (FPFS), and Trust and Estate Practitioner (TEP) qualifications from the Chartered Insurance Institute and STEP. Our team combines this expertise with an evidence-based approach grounded in decades of academic research.

Book a free, no-obligation discovery call. We'll discuss your current position, priorities, and what a practical plan could look like. We work with clients across Cheltenham and the Cotswolds, including Cirencester, Stow-on-the-Wold, Bourton-on-the-Water, Moreton-in-Marsh and surrounding villages.

Still have questions? We're here to help.

Evidence-based financial planning for fulfilling lives. Serving Cotswolds and Cirencester & The Cotswolds.

rockwealth Financial Advisers The Wool Market Cirencester, GL7 2PR
